title: Marvell Technology jumps almost 9% in premarket after news it will join the S&P 500 index
summary_full: Marvell rose in premarket trading after S&P Global said the AI chipmaker would join the S&P 500 on June 22.
summary_public: Marvell rose in premarket trading after S&P Global said the AI chipmaker would join the S&P 500 on June 22.
